quotes.text: Music is the universal language of mankind.
quotes.author: Henry Wadsworth Longfellow

quotes.text: Music gives a soul to the universe, wings to the mind, flight to the imagination, and life to everything.
quotes.author: Plato

quotes.text: Without music, life would be a mistake.
quotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quotes.text: Music is the shorthand of emotion.
quotes.author: Leo Tolstoy

quotes.text: I think music in itself is healing.
quotes.author: Billy Joel

quotes.text: Life is like a piano. What you get out of it depends on how you play it.
quotes.author: Bill Cosby

quotes.text: If I were not a physicist, I would probably be a musician.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein
